description: This pipeline appears to perform data processing and manipulation, starting with modifying tables through custom scripts, followed by removal of specific columns, application of row-wise expressions, and ultimately exporting the results in a suitable format, such as CSV or XLSX files, while also providing output for further analysis or storage.

629edac2-7ffc-40cb-a04c-69d08bcdb5a4.name: iji-export-table-v2
629edac2-7ffc-40cb-a04c-69d08bcdb5a4.description:
Exports a results table to CSV/XLSX

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

56b95f06-1710-413d-b866-1fa1711aebcb.name: modify-tables
56b95f06-1710-413d-b866-1fa1711aebcb.description: Executes a Python-script for each table. Each table is passed as dictionary 'table' with the column name as key and values being an array of strings or doubles. The number of input rows can be accessed via the 'nrow' variable.

e7414e56-c4c2-45af-bf65-6c07e755e56a.name: table-remove-columns
e7414e56-c4c2-45af-bf65-6c07e755e56a.description: Removes one or multiple columns by name

17798695-3883-4be1-b589-1821e0a0ede3.name: table-apply-expression-per-row-v2
17798695-3883-4be1-b589-1821e0a0ede3.description: Applies an expression for each row. The column values are available as variables.
